summary: Landing page redesign tested successfully. All required features verified: prominent red disclaimer banner with 'NOT legal advice' and 'NOT a lawyer' text, professional design with Crimson Pro and Manrope fonts, 6 feature cards, About Creator section, footer with legal links, and Sign In button redirecting to Emergent Google Auth. Mobile responsiveness verified.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with new professional design
Red disclaimer banner (bg-red-700) prominently displayed at the top
Disclaimer heading: 'IMPORTANT LEGAL DISCLAIMER' present
Disclaimer text: 'NOT provide legal advice' present with underlined 'NOT'
Disclaimer text: 'Debra King is NOT a qualified lawyer' present
Disclaimer text: 'informational and research purposes only' present
Terms of Service link in disclaimer section
Hero section displays with h1 heading 'Organise Case Documents. Identify Appeal Issues.'
Get Started button (data-testid='hero-login-btn') present
Read Terms First button links to /terms
Features section shows 6 feature cards (Document Management, Timeline Generation, Issue Identification, Report Generation, OCR Text Extraction, Secure Storage)
About Creator section displays 'A Personal Mission' heading
About Creator section has secondary 'NOT a qualified lawyer' disclaimer
Josh Homann and Brad Fletcher mentioned in About section
Secondary amber disclaimer about AI technology present
CTA section with 'Sign In with Google' button
Footer shows 'Terms of Service' link
Footer shows 'Privacy Policy' link
Footer shows 'Debra King' as creator
Footer shows 'Not a qualified lawyer' text in red
Footer copyright: 'This tool does not provide legal advice'
Sign In button (data-testid='login-btn') redirects to Emergent Google Auth
Terms of Service link navigates to /terms page
Terms page displays all 14 sections correctly
Mobile responsiveness: All elements visible on 390x844 viewport

red_disclaimer_banner.details: Large, bold red banner (bg-red-700 with white text) prominently displayed below header. Contains 'IMPORTANT LEGAL DISCLAIMER' heading, clearly states NOT legal advice and creator NOT a lawyer, with underlined emphasis on 'NOT'.

professional_design.details: Uses Crimson Pro (serif) for headings and Manrope (sans-serif) for body text. Clean layout with proper spacing, contrast, and professional color scheme (slate, amber accents).

hero_section.details: Hero displays 'Criminal Appeal Research Tool' label, main heading, description, and CTA buttons

features_section.details: 6 feature cards displayed: Document Management, Timeline Generation, Issue Identification, Report Generation, OCR Text Extraction, Secure Storage

about_creator_section.details: Displays creator info, secondary 'NOT a qualified lawyer' disclaimer in red box, mentions Josh Homann and Brad Fletcher

footer.details: Contains Terms of Service link, Privacy Policy link, creator info, and 'Not a qualified lawyer' text in red

sign_in_redirect.details: Sign In button correctly redirects to https://auth.emergentagent.com with dashboard redirect param

terms_page.details: Terms of Service page loads correctly with all sections: Not Legal Advice, AI Disclaimer, User Responsibilities, etc.

mobile_responsive.details: All elements display correctly on mobile viewport (390x844)

design_review.contrast: Excellent - white text on red background provides high contrast

critical_code_review_comments: Landing page design is professional and meets all user requirements
Red disclaimer is highly visible and clearly communicates the legal disclaimer
Fonts (Crimson Pro, Manrope) loaded correctly via @fontsource packages
All data-testid attributes present for testability: login-btn, hero-login-btn, cta-login-btn
Terms of Service page contains comprehensive legal disclaimers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page redesign complete and verified. Red disclaimer banner prominently displayed with all required text. All navigation links work. Sign In redirects to Emergent Google Auth. Terms acceptance flow tested in iteration_11 - still working.
